---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new skill or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is this a new skill or improvement to an existing one?**
New skill / Improvement

**Describe the skill/feature:**
What should it do? Who is it for?

**Example usage:**
```bash
forge your-skill-name [args]
```

**Why is this valuable?**
How much time/money would this save?
